productDisplayName: Quiksilver Men Grey Hammonds Cargo Shorts
description: CompositionWhite and grey striped walkshorts made of 100% cotton, has belt loops on the waistband, a button and zipper closure and internal drawcord, two insert pockets plus coin pocket on the sides, two bagged-out cargo pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, and two on the lower sides, brand name embroidered on the left front pocket and branding embroidered on the back right pocketFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanLine dry or tumble dry immediately after washingCool ironGet ready for the outdoors with these walking shorts from quiksilver. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day while the big practical pockets add style appeal. Team this with a bright tee and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with your pals.    Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
